Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stella Fey Epling, Esq. of North Beach Law, (415-433-1448), for Katherine Papageorge, Defendant and moving party.
No other appearance.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT KATHERINE PAPAGEORGE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff shall have a final opportunity to amend the complaint to allege each element of each cause of action with requisite specificity as set forth in the demurrer. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
